author: ShadyTidus
name: ShadyTourneys
short: Tournament and bracket management with Challonge integration
description: Comprehensive tournament management with solo/team modes, multiple bracket formats (single/double elimination, round robin), and Challonge API integration for hosted brackets. Features bracket visualization, match reporting, prize pool tracking, and persistent signup views.
install_msg:
ShadyTourneys installed!

**User Commands:**
- `/tourney` - Create or list tournaments
- `/tourneymanage` - Start, cancel, view brackets, report matches

**Admin Commands:**
- `/tourneyset` - Configure guild settings

**Bot Owner Setup (Challonge):**
1. Get API key from https://challonge.com/settings/developer
2. Run: `/challongeset credentials <username> <api_key>`
3. Check status: `/challongeset status`
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores tournament data including user IDs of participants, team compositions, match results, and tournament metadata. Challonge API credentials are stored globally.
